category_sources: Official non-GNU Savannah and nongnu pages describe Texi2HTML as a Perl script converting Texinfo source files to HTML output.
source_facts.description says texi2html converts TeXinfo files to HTML.
display_name_sources: Official Savannah project name is Texi2HTML.
docs_sources: Official Savannah project page provides project overview, source, support, and historical release information.
source_facts.homepage is the official nongnu Texi2HTML homepage.
repo_sources: Official nongnu homepage notes development moved to GNU Texinfo and stopped, so CVS browse URL is the historical project source-control surface for this package.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was determined from official Savannah Texi2HTML project page, which lists Source code and Browse CVS repository.
tags_sources: Official nongnu and Savannah pages describe Texi2HTML as a Perl conversion script for Texinfo source files to HTML output.
